mapper.sql: SELECT p.plan_id, p.plan_name, p.equipment_id, e.equipment_name, p.category_id, p.trigger_type, p.cycle_value, p.cycle_unit, p.task_list, p.spare_part_list, p.estimated_hours, p.advance_days, p.auto_assign, p.assignee_id, p.assignee_name, p.last_execute_time, p.next_execute_time, p.status, p.del_flag, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark FROM dms_pm_plan p LEFT JOIN dms_equipment e ON p.equipment_id = e.equipment_id
mapper.delete: UPDATE dms_pm_plan SET del_flag = '2' WHERE plan_id IN #{planId}
mapper.select: WHERE p.del_flag = '0' AND p.status = '0' AND p.next_execute_time IS NOT NULL AND DATE_ADD(p.next_execute_time, INTERVAL -IFNULL(p.advance_days, 0) DAY) <= NOW() AND p.trigger_type = '0' ORDER BY p.next_execute_time ASC
